    'models/task.py': 'Y2xhc3MgVGFzazoKICAgIGRlZiBfX2luaXRfXyhzZWxmLCB0aXRsZSwgZG9uZSk6CiAgICAgICAgc2VsZi50aXRsZSA9IHRpdGxlCiAgICAgICAgc2VsZi5kb25lID0gZG9uZQoKICAgIGRlZiBzdW1tYXJ5KHNlbGYpOgogICAgICAgIHN0YXR1cyA9ICJkb25lIiBpZiBzZWxmLmRvbmUgZWxzZSAib3BlbiIKICAgICAgICByZXR1cm4gZiJ7c2VsZi50aXRsZX0gKHtzdGF0dXN9KSIK',
